description: Typical fun-doc output on get_stat_list_flags — recognizes the StatList magic + flags pattern, names accordingly, plate mentions the magic 0x01020304 and offset 0x10.

captured.name: ReadStatListFlags
captured.plate: Reads the flags bitfield from a StatList structure. Validates the list pointer is non-null and the magic number at offset 0 matches 0x01020304 (StatList tag). On success returns the 32-bit value at offset 0x10. Returns 0 on invalid pointer or magic mismatch (corruption guard).

args.comment: Reads the flags bitfield from a StatList...
